---
name: Content Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to framework documentation, phase content, or case studies
title: "[CONTENT] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Which content needs improvement?

- [ ] Phase: ___  (V / I / S / T / A / D / E / L)
- [ ] Case study: ___
- [ ] FAQ
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide
- [ ] Tier documentation (Tier 1 / 2 / 3)
- [ ] Other: ___

## What's the issue?

Describe what is inaccurate, unclear, missing, or outdated.

## Suggested Improvement

Describe what the content should say or include instead.

## Why does this matter?

What is the impact of the current content? Who is affected?

## Supporting Evidence

- Link to relevant resource, tool, or documentation
- Real-world example or case study
- Code example (if applicable — must be tested)

## Do you plan to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'll fix this myself
- [ ] No, I'd like someone else to address it
